text: Arthritis Foundation | Arthritis Support, Resources, Research & Advocacy this Arthritis Awareness Month to help conquer arthritis. You are driving change for millions living with arthritis — accelerating research, strengthening care and delivering critical resources and support. today and a stronger future for everyone affected. in the U. S. struggles with arthritis pain in the U. S.

fight osteoarthritis, including many young adults As the nation’s #1 cause of disability, arthritis affects nearly 60 million adults and hundreds of thousands of children. Over 100 types of arthritis and related conditions damage the joints and often other organs. We provide ways for you to take control of arthritis by connecting you with others who understand the challenges.

With your help, we shape and influence health care policies and laws at both state and federal levels. With your insights, we make sure effective arthritis treatments are being developed while also pursuing a cure. Kevin grew up watching his mom struggle with “arthur-itis. ” Now he lives with osteoarthritis and inspires others to stay strong and seek support.

Our trained Helpline team is here to help answer your questions about arthritis and how to manage it. They can tell you about open enrollment for insurance, important changes to Medicare drug plans, treatment options, navigating medical systems and more.

Find out about different types of arthritis pain and get expert guidance, along with a live demonstration, to help you create a personalized plan to manage your pain. Latest Live Yes! With Arthritis Podcast Episode In this episode, we explore and explain gout — what causes it, how it affects the joints and other parts of the body, how it’s treated, what you can do to help manage it and more.

Take the next step with confidence after an arthritis diagnosis. This free e-book offers expert support, practical tools and answers to help you understand treatment, care and daily management. Learn what to expect from your disease, practical tips to help you manage it and other useful information.

Protections in North Carolina Medicaid Work Requirements The Arthritis Foundation joins partners in urging patient protections in North Carolina Medicaid work requirements. This young girl is a competitive figure skater despite her juvenile arthritis. Arthritis Foundation, AOFAS partner to fund orthopedic training for foot and ankle care.

Patients and health care providers unite in the fight to conquer arthritis and honor their Walk to Cure Arthritis team leader. The Arthritis Foundation Cycling Experience Celebrates Milestones The Arthritis Foundation celebrates 25 years of the California Coast Classic Bike Tour and launches the inaugural Carolina Hills Classic Bike Tour.

New Jersey Advocacy Wins Arthritis Policy Trifecta The Arthritis Foundation celebrates the coordinated efforts of New Jersey advocates that have led to the approval and signing of three top legislative priorities in the state. Get involved with the arthritis community.
Tell us a little about yourself and, based on your interests, you’ll receive emails packed with the latest information and resources to live your best life and connect with others.
